item.title: @Mrs G’s Upgrade If you're really as hungry for truth as you say, I hope you'll let me be a resource for you and your students. #science #biology #evolution #eyes #learnontiktok

item.title: Recovering from Religion is an awesome organization that helps people through their deconstruction and to overcome their religious trauma. With a massive staff of therapists and volunteers, they're ready to take your calls and give you the tools you need

item.title: Answers in Genesis is a literal cult that uses lies about evolution to trick people into believing in dragons, unicorns, and a planet that's younger than Göbekli Tepe. Don't fall for it. #science #biology #dinosaur #life #learnontiktok
item.description: Answers in Genesis is a literal cult that uses lies about evolution to trick people into believing in dragons, unicorns, and a planet that's younger than Göbekli Tepe. Don't fall for it. #science #biology #dinosaur #life #learnontiktok

item.title: This is the funniest thing that's ever happened to me and I'm begging you to go watch the video so you know I'm not making it up. #science #Christian #movie #bad #creepy

item.title: To make your own Valkalized Bath Water at home, just mix 3 tablespoons ground deer teeth, 2 cups gender fluid, a pinch of cortisol, and one gallon of fresh squeezed Valkai to each bathtub of water. #science #biology #water #Christian #movie

item.title: This was my cold open from today's show. If you have questions or complaints about any part of it, feel free to pick up the phone. I host AXP the first Sunday of every month and The Line every Sunday (including in the evening after AXP). #science #skeptic
item.description: This was my cold open from today's show. If you have questions or complaints about any part of it, feel free to pick up the phone. I host AXP the first Sunday of every month and The Line every Sunday (including in the evening after AXP). #science #skeptic

item.title: I've had this poem memorized since I was around 13. I never knew that I'd need it at 33. #poetry #politics #learn #antifascist #poem
item.description: I've had this poem memorized since I was around 13. I never knew that I'd need it at 33. #poetry #politics #learn #antifascist #poem

item.title: I cannot comprehend how anyone could even remotely support this. It's a shame there's no such thing as a Hell for them to burn in. #america #usa #immigration #fdt #musicfestival
